title: Property Consultant - WeWork India - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - WeWork India - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
WeWork India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Property Consultant for our Thane operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About WeWork India:
WeWork India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with WeWork India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
